mapper.select: SELECT s.student_id, s.course_id, c.course_name, s.member_id, s.member_name, s.enroll_date, s.completion_date, s.status FROM erp_training_student s LEFT JOIN erp_course c ON s.course_id = c.course_id WHERE s.status = 'COMPLETE' AND (s.member_name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR c.course_name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%') ORDER BY s.completion_date DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM erp_training_student s LEFT JOIN erp_course c ON s.course_id = c.course_id WHERE s.status = 'COMPLETE' AND (s.member_name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR c.course_name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')
